saveUser body is a stub that always returns null; no repository call observed at that site

private helper methods (getRoutesByRouteIds, getRouteByRouteId, both price-config lookups) were read for effect/semantic evidence but not given their own capability atoms since they are not public service-interface methods
differs from basic-service SecurityConfig: gates the service path behind ADMIN-or-USER role instead of permitting it unauthenticated
per-endpoint @CrossOrigin(origins="*") annotations are a separate authority surface from the class-level corsConfigurer in SecurityConfig, kept as distinct atoms
the exception-caught branch in cancelTicket returns status 1 with message text 'error', the same status code as the successful-delegate branch
